_comment: Registry of Claude agents working concurrently on this repo. Each agent owns the listed paths exclusively — the pre-commit hook (.githooks/agent-pre-commit) refuses to let any agent commit paths owned by ANOTHER agent. Add or remove agents here when the team changes. Paths are matched as PREFIXES (so 'frontend/src/lib/queue/' covers every file under that folder).

queue.description: Offline-resilient capture queue, drainer, PWA / offline app shell, queue UI surfaces.

photo.description: Photo capture flow, vision extraction (Doc AI), bake-off scripts.
